data.text: M15/P07 A FELISIAN WORLD. GREEN HUE, LARGE BODIES OF WATER. LANDED
AT 307.56 DURING A RAIN SQUALL ON ROLLING GRASSY LAND WITH SMALL
PLANTS. THERE WAS A HOPPER AND BIRDS PRESENT, BUT AN UNUSUA SHAPE
IN THE DISTANCE CAUGHT ATTENTION. IT TURNED OUT TO BE A GRASSY
COVERED FORMATION ONLY SLIGHTLY REMINISCENT OF AN ARTIFACT FOUND ON
A HOME WORLD IF MEMORY SERVES. AT 357.83 THE LA
LANDING POD ROLLED DOWN A STEEP HILL AND CAME TO REST ON A TREE.
A CRATER FORMATION SIGHTED DURING LANDING WAS INVESTIGATED AFTER
AN UPHILL TREK AND TURENED OUT TO BE ATOP HIGH HILL NEARBY.
POSSIBLE VOLCANIC? AT 248.60 IN SLIGHTLY ROLLING GRASSLAND WITH
SHRUBS THERE WAS TALL PEAK DOMINATING THE LANDSCAPE. PRO 0.165.960
